prestazioni: Engine swap to L15B7 (1.5L turbocharged DOHC i-VTEC) with a custom HKS GT-SS turbo kit featuring a Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger, HKS Hi-Power exhaust manifold, and HKS SSQV4 blow-off valve for optimized spool and response in the compact engine bay

Full custom wiring harness by Wireworks Japan to integrate a Haltech Elite 2500 ECU with flex-fuel capability, paired with a Hondata K-Pro V4 for direct OBD-II integration and real-time datalogging of the L15B7’s direct injection system

Tein Flex Z coilovers with custom valving for the Freed Spike’s unique rear torsion beam suspension, paired with Cusco front strut tower bars and a Whiteline rear sway bar (22mm) to mitigate body roll during aggressive cornering
estetica: Liberal Auto Works ‘Spike RS’ widebody kit with extended front fenders (FRP construction) and a custom rear diffuser to accommodate 225/40R18 Yokohama Advan Neova AD08R tires on Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels (18x8 +35 offset)

Seibon Carbon fiber hood with a custom NACA duct for L15B7 intercooler cooling, paired with a J’s Racing rear roof spoiler (Type II) and a custom front lip splitter by Garage Vary for aggressive JDM stance

Full interior overhaul with Bride Zeta III bucket seats (custom mounts for the Freed Spike’s sliding rear seats), a Nardi Classic steering wheel (350mm), and a custom roll cage by AutoTechnic Japan (8-point, bolt-in) with red Takata Drift II harnesses
